post.topic: Claude API automation and optimization tips
post.hook: 4 Claude API tricks that will save you hours of development time
post.caption:
4 Claude API tricks that will save you hours of development time

Save this carousel for your next Claude API project.

slides.title: 4 Claude API Power Tips
slides.subtitle: Automate smarter, code faster, build better

slides.title: Smart Response Caching
slides.body: Use cache_control to automatically cache responses and reduce API costs by up to 90% for repeated queries.

slides.title: Structured JSON Output
slides.body: Force Claude to return valid JSON every time using the new output_config.format parameter.

slides.title: Automatic Retry Logic
slides.body: Handle rate limits gracefully with exponential backoff to make your apps production-ready.

slides.title: Streaming for UX
slides.body: Stream responses in real-time to create ChatGPT-like typing effects that keep users engaged.
slides.code_snippet:
stream = client.messages.create(
    model="claude-3-sonnet-20240229",
    messages=messages,
    stream=True
)
for chunk in stream:
    print(chunk.delta.text, end="")
